seoTitle: Hazelgrove vs Heathcote — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hazelgrove and Heathcote. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hazelgrove and Heathcote.
heading: Hazelgrove vs Heathcote — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hazelgrove, New South Wales and Heathcote, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Heathcote has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hazelgrove (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hazelgrove or Heathcote safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hazelgrove has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Heathcote scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hazelgrove scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Heathcote scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hazelgrove or Heathcote?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Heathcote has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
